protocol.name: swm_workspace_v1
protocol.copyright:
Copyright (C) 2026 swm contributors
This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.

interface.name: swm_workspace_manager_v1

description.summary: inspect and change swm workspace metadata

interface.description:
This interface exposes ephemeral titles and colors associated with swm's fixed workspaces. Metadata exists only for the lifetime of the compositor process.
When a client binds, the compositor sends one metadata event for every workspace followed by done. Later changes are sent in the same way.

entry.name: invalid_workspace
entry.summary: workspace number is out of range

entry.name: selected
entry.summary: the workspace is selected by swm

event.name: metadata
event.description: The workspace number starts at one. Color is encoded as 0xRRGGBBAA; zero means unset and omits the color bit from flags. An empty title means the additional label is unset. Selected identifies the workspace on swm's currently selected output.

request.name: set_title
request.description: Set the title of a workspace. An empty title clears it.

request.name: set_color
request.description: Set the color of a workspace. Zero clears it.
